app.softLine: Track your menstrual cycle, symptoms, and patterns for better health awareness.
app.footerLegal: For educational purposes only - not medical advice. In emergencies, seek professional medical help.

auth.loginBlurb: Your cycles and notes stay private to this account — pick up where you left off.
auth.badCredentials: That email or password doesn’t match. Try again, or create a new space.
auth.signupTitle: Your body deserves its own room
auth.signupBlurb: One account = your data only. Passwords are hashed on the server; we never sell your health story.
auth.passwordHint: Use at least 8 characters so your account stays safe.
auth.emailTaken: That email already has an account — try signing in.
auth.signupFailed: Couldn’t create your account. Check your connection and try again.

home.welcome: Welcome to your personal health dashboard! Track your cycle patterns and get helpful insights about your body with SheWins.
home.riskSub: Based on your patterns - not medical advice
home.noPred: Add a few more period entries to get better predictions.

track.title: Log this chapter of your body
track.subtitle: Dates, flow, mood, sleep — small truths add up to big clarity.

analytics.title: Your Health Patterns
analytics.heatmap: Six Month Overview - Pink shows period days

chat.hint: Ask in plain words — we share awareness, never prescriptions.
chat.placeholder: e.g. When should I worry about very long gaps?

reminders.emptySmart: Log more cycles to get personalized suggestions.

settings.analyticsLabel: Optional anonymised analytics (if your host enables it)
settings.privacyNote: Sessions use secure tokens; set JWT_SECRET and Firebase in production.
settings.darkModeDesc: Reduce eye strain in low light
settings.periodRemindersDesc: Get notified before your expected period
settings.dataSharingDesc: Share anonymized data to improve the app
settings.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how you use the app
settings.crashReportingDesc: Automatically report crashes to help us fix issues
settings.exportDataDesc: Download all your health data in a printable format
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all data
